author: hani
abstract: Holistic UX design intelligence for building clean, usable UI artifacts. Organizes guidance into 7 pillars — Foundations, Layout & Hierarchy, Visual Design, Interaction & Motion, Navigation & IA, Content & Microcopy, and Accessibility & Inclusion — applied through a build workflow that turns intent into a clean artifact. Knowledge is distilled into atomic, sourced rules from practitioner talks; the Content & Microcopy pillar ships with 25 rules across errors, states, forms, feedback, and onboarding.
